name: Credit Exhausted Gating and Upsell Trigger

parameters.responseBody:
={
  "success": true,
  "action": "gated_and_upsell_sent",
  "user_id": "{{ $('Confirm Email Sent').first().json.user_id }}",
  "credits_gated": true,
  "email_sent": {{ $('Confirm Email Sent').first().json.email_sent }},
  "upsell_target": "{{ $('Confirm Email Sent').first().json.next_tier }}"
}
